title: Clear Glass Apothecary Jars, Candy Jar with Lid, Elegant Decorative Jars for Wedding and Party, Tall Glass Canister for Kitchen and Bathroom (Height: 17", Diameter: 4"; 57 FL.OZ)
description:
About this item
HANDCRAFTED GLASS JARS: These large apothecary jars with lids are hand-blown from high-quality glass making each clear glass jar unique. A small amount of air bubbles is normal.
LARGE SIZE: The size of the decorative glass jar is 17" (height)× 4" (diameter), 57 fl.oz in capacity. The height helps our glass canister to hold a variety of larger food items such as spaghetti and chocolate energy bars.
CLASSIC FOOTED JAR DESIGN: Our tall apothecary candy jar can be used as an elegant decoration. You can add other bought or made crafts to the glass display jar and make it your own unique creative jar, adding joyful energy flow to your environment.
PERFECT GIFT: The candy jar for candy buffet is very simple, elegant and classic. Our candy canister glass must be a perfect gift for your family and friends, especially when visiting a new neighbor or a friend who is housewarming.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: If you encounter quality or transport damage issues, you can choose a replacement or refund. Do not hesitate to contact us; we from Stella Baicø will help you ASAP. Customer satisfaction is our top priority.

reviews_5s: Filled it with candy for a holiday centerpiece.Great size and quality for a large candy jar for my daughter’s birthday party.
reviews_1s: This the 2nd time I have to send this back because of receiving it not only broken but SHATTERED....I mean, the top of the jar wasn’t broken, so there’s that…I guess.This product I was anxiously awaiting arrived smashed beyond repair.This is the second glass jar I reordered that was a box of broken glass.
